PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?event ?eventLabel WHERE {

  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventLabel) , 'wrestling'))
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(?date >= "1980-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
}
